'''Brint-wo Colony''' was a [[Golan Space Colony 3]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]] situated near [[Brint-wo]].

==History==
It was where the [[Azzameen family]] rendezvoused with [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Olin Garn]] before moving on to supply a secret nearby [[Hospital (XQ2 Platform)|hospital]] treating wounded personnel from the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].

The communications operator on hand during the rendezvous was aware of the meeting; it was likely that Brint-wo had Alliance sympathies.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
